comment: Two layers. 'blocked' matches BOTH raw codeMarker AND extracted component (case-insensitive), and is skipped for Errors/Warnings so real failures are never hidden. 'messageBlocked' is the narrow OVERRIDE for known platform Warning/Error noise that bypasses 'blocked' purely because of its level. Every messageBlocked pattern is sanity-guarded against a corpus of real FLT failure messages in tests/test_blocklist_message_pattern_drop.py — do not add a pattern without extending that corpus first. v8: round-2 message drops (cert store gap, DependencyMonitoring failed-to-report, throttling middleware chatter, serializer init benign warning, CertifiedEvents partial type load, AuthenticationEngine no-op warnings).

blocked.reason: All Microsoft.* framework noise (AspNetCore, Extensions, EF)
Framework/startup logs with no MonitoredScope and no derivable display name — pure platform chatter (workload boot, feature-flight resolution, serializer init)

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Failed to create metric:.*because platform dimensions could not be initialized
messageBlocked.reason: Dev-mode AppInsights metric pipeline can't initialize platform dimensions. Fires as Warning from every component. NOT a failure — it's missing infra in dev mode.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Initialization of ServiceMetric platform dimensions failed because the context is not initialized
messageBlocked.reason: Sibling of the AppInsights metric init failure above — same root cause.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Cannot retrieve SSL protocol since http response message content stream is null
messageBlocked.reason: PbiClientRequest emits this Warning when probing PBI for protocol info in dev mode. Not a real failure.

Dev-mode cert store does not contain the WCL infra certs (test.s2s, edog.deployment, edog.mwctoken, edog.mwctokenencryption, edog.signedpayload, edog.mdsmonitoring, edog.mdmmonitoring, livetable.workload.localhost). Fires as Error during cert probing. Real cert problems surface as CertificateKeyNotSupportedException (different shape) and still pass.

Sibling of the AppInsights metric-init failure. Tight match — pattern requires '(availablity|latency) value for' which only the dev-mode report-failures use. Real DependencyMonitoring failures use different verbs.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Throttling is skipped for the route via SkipThrottlingAttribute
messageBlocked.reason: WCL middleware logs every SkipThrottling decision as Warning. No-op chatter. Real throttling decisions log a different shape ('Throttling DECISION', 'Capacity throttling triggered').
WCL middleware Warning when upstream omits/malforms the throttling header. Dev-mode chatter, no functional impact.

messageBlocked.pattern: Type 'Microsoft\.ServicePlatform\.Utilities\.IFlightDelegateCaller' with name '' was not registered in the container
messageBlocked.reason: Serializer<T>.ShouldUseLockFreeImplementation() catches this and falls back to legacy serializer. Pre-existing benign warning. Real DI failures use different inner types.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Flight 'MWC_SerializerLockFreeImplementation' evaluation failed with exception\. Defaulting to legacy implementation\.
messageBlocked.reason: Sibling of the IFlightDelegateCaller warning above — same root cause, logged separately by the Serializer fallback path.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Partial type load for assembly Microsoft\.CertifiedEvents\.Server: \d+ loader exception\(s\)\.
messageBlocked.reason: ServicePlatform partial type-load Warning for CertifiedEvents. Benign reflection scan chatter. Real type-load failures use a different shape.
WCL AuthenticationEngine Warning when ONE authenticator in a chain rejects but another succeeds. Real auth failure surfaces as 401/403 from the controller — different shape, passes through.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^(?:oid|upn) claim is not present in AuthenticationContext
messageBlocked.reason: WCL platform-claim probe Warning fired per request even when the principal succeeds via a different claim source. No-op chatter.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^oid claim is missing for app [0-9a-f-]+\. Ignoring in (P3SAuthorization|PPE)
messageBlocked.reason: WCL P3S/PPE authorization Warning when an OBO app lacks oid claim. Authorization continues via fallback. Real denials log a different shape. v10: extended to accept 'Ignoring in PPE' suffix observed live (the P3SAuthorization branch was a v8 assumption that didn't hold in EDog).

Round 3 (2026-06-07): emitted as Message from inside FLT-baseline controllers (LiveTableController-GetLatestDAG etc.) right before the dimension-init failure Warning. Pure ServicePlatform chatter — anchored with $ to require exact match so any decorated variant still flows.
Round 3: WCL/HTTP-handler Verbose chatter emitted from FLT-baseline OneLake FSRequest components on every outbound. Anchored exact-match.

Round 4 (2026-06-07): JSON-shaped InternalError envelope emitted during WorkloadInitialization when the orchestrator-side controller is unreachable in dev. Pattern requires BOTH the InternalError code AND the 'from the Orchestrator(' substring with literal paren — narrow enough that other 'Received non-success response from GTS/OneLake' messages still pass.
Round 5 (2026-06-07): WCL audit middleware no-op Warning fired on every incoming request. Anchored exact-match — real audit failures use different shape.

messageBlocked.pattern: ^Caller identity is not set for SecurityAuditCallerIdentityType\.
messageBlocked.reason: Round 5: Dev-mode security audit can't determine the caller — Warning emitted per request. Real auth/caller failures use a different shape.
Round 5: LiveTable-Telemetry-Reporter's per-emit announcement Message — actual telemetry goes via SSR, this is a no-op confirmation. Anchored exact-match.
